tests.test_name: pytest - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a single pytest fixture and verifies that the analysis produces valid, resolved JSON output containing at least one named test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: pytest - PO - single test, core output structure
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'pytest' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'pytest_single_sample.py', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON is resolved, contains 1 or more tests, each with a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: pytest - PO - parametrize expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a data-driven pytest fixture and verifies that parametrize decoration causes the analyser to expand each parameter row into its own distinct test entry.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: pytest - PO - parametrize expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'pytest' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'pytest_datadriven_sample.py', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Downloaded JSON is resolved, contains 3 or more tests, each with a non-empty test_name — confirming parametrize rows are expanded

tests.test_name: pytest - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a single pytest fixture and verifies that the analysis produces valid JSON output where the first test contains a populated coverage matrix.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: pytest - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'pytest' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'pytest_single_sample.py', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Downloaded JSON is resolved, contains 1 or more tests each with a non-empty test_name, and the first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a data-driven pytest fixture and verifies that parametrize decoration causes the analyser to collapse all rows into exactly one test entry whose coverage matrix rows match the number of examples and conform to the generic schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'pytest' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'pytest_datadriven_sample.py', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Downloaded JSON is resolved, contains exactly 1 test with a non-empty test_name; coverage matrix row count matches the parametrize examples and rows conform to the generic schema
